name: Skipper Limited
summary: Skipper Limited manufactures and sells engineering and polymer products in India. It operates through Engineering Products, Infrastructure Projects, and Polymer Products segments. The Engineering Products segment offers power transmission towers, transmission line monopoles, power distribution and lighting poles, mid steel and high tensile angles, fasteners, tower accessories, telecom towers, railway electrification structures, angles, channels, high mast poles, swaged poles, scaffoldings, and solar power systems. The Infrastructure Projects segment provides horizontal direct drilling services; and engineering, procurement, and construction services. Its solutions cover transmission line EPC, and underground utility laying by horizontal directional drilling. The Polymer Products segment offers PVC, UPVC, CPVC, SWR, agricultural, and bore well pipes and fitting, as well as other related products; and CPVC solvent cement, cistens, and bath accessories. The company also exports its products to Africa, Australia, the Middle East, South and Southeast Asia, South America, and Europe. Skipper Limited was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
